mapper.select:
SELECT B.id personId, B.name, D.name orgName, B.work_type type, B.plan_class_hour, SUM(IFNULL(A.study_hours, 0)) sumClassHour, IFNULL(SUM(study_hours), 0) yearClassHour FROM xm_project_person_study_record A RIGHT JOIN xm_person B ON A.person_id = B.id LEFT JOIN sys_org D ON B.org_id = D.id WHERE B.is_delete = 0 AND YEAR(A.create_time) = #{year}
AND (B.org_id = #{orgId} OR D.pids like concat('%[', #{orgId}, ']%'))
AND B.name like concat('%', #{personName}, '%')
GROUP BY B.id
ORDER BY sumClassHour DESC
ORDER BY yearClassHour DESC

SELECT B.id personId, B.name, D.name orgName, B.work_type type, B.plan_class_hour, SUM(IFNULL(A.study_hours, 0)) sumClassHour, IFNULL(SUM(study_hours), 0) yearClassHour FROM xm_project_person_study_record A RIGHT JOIN xm_person B ON A.person_id = B.id LEFT JOIN sys_org D ON B.org_id = D.id WHERE B.is_delete = 0 AND YEAR(A.create_time) = YEAR(NOW())
AND (B.org_id = #{orgId} OR D.pids like concat('%[', #{orgId}, ']%'))
GROUP BY B.id
order by sumClassHour desc
order by yearClassHour desc
LIMIT 10

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM xm_person WHERE is_delete = 0 AND org_id = #{orgId}) AS person_count, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FROM xm_person a LEFT JOIN xm_person_course_relate b ON a.id = b.person_id WHERE a.is_delete = 0 AND a.org_id = #{orgId} AND b.is_sign = 3) AS train_count, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(study_hours), 0) FROM xm_person a LEFT JOIN xm_project_person_study_record b ON a.id = b.person_id WHERE a.is_delete = 0 AND a.org_id = #{orgId} AND YEAR(b.create_time) = YEAR(NOW())) AS year_class_hour, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(study_hours), 0) FROM xm_person a LEFT JOIN xm_project_person_study_record b ON a.id = b.person_id WHERE a.is_delete = 0 AND a.org_id = #{orgId}) AS sum_class_hour
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM xm_person A LEFT JOIN sys_org B ON A.org_id = B.id WHERE (A.org_id = #{orgId} OR B.pids LIKE CONCAT('%[', #{orgId}, ']%')) AND state = 1 AND A.is_delete = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM xm_person A LEFT JOIN sys_user B ON A.user_id = B.id LEFT JOIN sys_org C ON A.org_id = C.id WHERE (A.org_id = #{orgId} OR C.pids LIKE CONCAT('%[', #{orgId}, ']%')) AND A.state = 1 AND A.is_delete = 0 AND B.login_date >= #{loginTime}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT course_id) FROM xm_project_person_study_record A INNER JOIN xm_person B ON A.person_id = B.id INNER JOIN sys_org C ON B.org_id = C.id WHERE (B.org_id = #{orgId} OR C.pids LIKE CONCAT('%[', #{orgId}, ']%'))

SELECT SUM(A.study_hours) FROM xm_project_person_study_record A INNER JOIN xm_person B ON A.person_id = B.id INNER JOIN sys_org C ON B.org_id = C.id WHERE (B.org_id = #{orgId} OR C.pids LIKE CONCAT('%[', #{orgId}, ']%')) AND A.is_delete = 0

SELECT B.id personId, B.name target, A.create_time eventTime, C.course_name event FROM xm_project_person_study_record A RIGHT JOIN xm_person B ON A.person_id = B.id LEFT JOIN xm_course C ON A.course_id = C.id INNER JOIN sys_org D ON B.org_id = D.id WHERE (B.org_id = #{orgId} OR D.pids LIKE CONCAT('%[', #{orgId}, ']%')) ORDER BY A.create_time DESC LIMIT 6

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(B.login_date, '%Y-%m-%d') date, COUNT(*) count FROM xm_person A LEFT JOIN sys_user B ON A.user_id = B.id LEFT JOIN sys_org C ON A.org_id = C.id WHERE (A.org_id = #{orgId} OR C.pids LIKE CONCAT('%[', #{orgId}, ']%')) AND A.state = 1 AND A.is_delete = 0 AND B.login_date >= #{loginTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(B.login_date, '%Y-%m-%d')

SELECT D.id, D.name, COUNT(DISTINCT course_id) finishOfCourses FROM xm_project_person_study_record A RIGHT JOIN xm_person B ON A.person_id = B.id LEFT JOIN sys_org D ON B.org_id = D.id WHERE (B.org_id = #{orgId} OR D.pids LIKE CONCAT('%[', #{orgId}, ']%')) AND course_id IS NOT NULL AND B.is_delete = 0 GROUP BY D.id ORDER BY finishOfCourses DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT D.id, D.name, SUM(A.study_hours) totalClassHours FROM xm_project_person_study_record A RIGHT JOIN xm_person B ON A.person_id = B.id LEFT JOIN sys_org D ON B.org_id = D.id WHERE (B.org_id = #{orgId} OR D.pids LIKE CONCAT('%[', #{orgId}, ']%')) AND course_id IS NOT NULL AND B.is_delete = 0 GROUP BY D.id ORDER BY totalClassHours DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT B.id personId, B.name, COUNT(DISTINCT course_id) finishOfCourses FROM xm_project_person_study_record A RIGHT JOIN xm_person B ON A.person_id = B.id LEFT JOIN sys_org D ON B.org_id = D.id WHERE (B.org_id = #{orgId} OR D.pids LIKE CONCAT('%[', #{orgId}, ']%')) AND B.is_delete = 0 GROUP BY B.id ORDER BY finishOfCourses DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT B.id personId, B.name, IFNULL(SUM(study_hours), 0) yearClassHour FROM xm_project_person_study_record A RIGHT JOIN xm_person B ON A.person_id = B.id LEFT JOIN sys_org D ON B.org_id = D.id WHERE (B.org_id = #{orgId} OR D.pids LIKE CONCAT('%[', #{orgId}, ']%')) AND B.is_delete = 0 AND YEAR(A.create_time) = YEAR(NOW()) GROUP BY B.id ORDER BY yearClassHour DESC LIMIT 10
